headline: Here's How Declining Crude Oil Prices are Benefiting Valero Energy

headline: VLO vs KMI: Which Energy Pick Offers a Better Investment Opportunity?
summary: Valero's refining upside and discounted valuation stand out, while Kinder Morgan offers stable cash flows and exposure to U.S. natural gas growth.

headline: Is Valero Energy (VLO) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Valero Energy (VLO) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
